title: Simple Bars
body:
# Welcome to Simple Bars!

This resource pack changes the look of the bars in Minecraft to be more simple and/or more aesthetically pleasing than the vanilla style. And for the people who use mods, this resource pack is compatible with [Appleskin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin), [Detail Armor Bar](https://modrinth.com/mod/detail-armor-bar), [Armorskin](https://modrinth.com/mod/armorskin)  and with mods with custom boss battles who use one of the colored boss bar variants.

## Features
### V2.1
- Removed unwanted overlay elements on some Boss Bars
- Added Simple Armor Bar (Compatible with [Detail Armor Bar](https://modrinth.com/mod/detail-armor-bar) and [Armorskin](https://modrinth.com/mod/armorskin))
- Added Simple Oxygen Bar
### V2
- Reworked background of the Health and Hunger Bar
- Added Simple Boss Bars (Also available as a seperate resouce pack called [Simple Boss Bars](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simple-boss-bars))
- Added Simple Animal Health Bar
- Added Simple Horse Jump Bar
### V1.1
- Simple XP Bar
- Simple Health Bar for Hardcore
### V1
- Simple Health Bar
- Simple Hunger Bar (Compatible with [Appleskin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin))
